chapter_title.en: Chapter on Giving the Choice (to the wife)

text: 4815 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ قَالَ: "مَا لِلنِّسَاءِ وَ اَلتَّخْيِيرَ إِنَّمَا ذَلِكَ شَيْءٌ خَصَّ اَللَّهُ بِهِ نَبِيَّهُ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4815 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"What do women have to do with takhyīr (being given the choice in divorce)?
That is something which Allah specifically granted to His Prophet (may Allah bless him and his family)."
